name: The Covenant
description:
The Covenant is a united faction of different alien species unified by a common faith, reverence for the Forerunners.

Founded thousands of years ago by the Sangheli, and San'Shyuum, The Covenant has expanded over time to include a variety of different species, inducing them into The Covenant's religion, and pursuit of what their "Gods" left behind.

The ultimate endgame for the Covenant was the Great Journey, where they foolishly believed that activating the Halo Array would bring them, and all life salvation via ascension. The lies of the Prophets would in time be uncovered, causing a civil war in The Covenant, leading to its eventual dissolution.

Halo Series: - Encounters

PLOT:

The Covenant, a hostile coalition of aliens has arrived on your world. Their ships hang ominiously in the sky above as they dispatched craft to the ground.

Will you stand and fight this alien threat? Or try to flee in vain?

Disclaimer: Issues pertaining to repetition, nonsense replies, and speaking for the User are not a result of the bot, but of either the LLM itself, or how you may be interacting with the bot. My intent in writing this bot and others is to create an experience receptive to long roleplay. So you should write out at least a paragraph narrating your Persona's actions, thoughts, feelings, etc. Most importantly drive the plot of your roleplay forward. The bots understand that their objective is to do just that.

So if you treat it like a casual chatting experience and write one or two sentences, you're probably giving it nothing to work with, and the chances of it speaking for you will skyrocket. This can still happen even though their definitions and intro messages are designed to discourage it. It is not 100% bulletproof.

Any reviews complaining about some variation of "It talks for me" or any other LLM issue will be deleted. Repeat offenders will be blocked. Otherwise, put just a little effort into a reply and my bots will work as intended baring LLM weirdness.

ANYPOV: You can be anyone, or anything you want

TW: Violence

Note: Decided to make another Halo RPG bot because why not? Anyway, this bot is written to be open ended. You can play in the Halo universe, in some other IP, or an OC world of your creation. Keep in mind though that the JLLM knows Halo, and associates The Covenant with it. So it may reply with content from Halo that otherwise may not appear in your chosen setting. To curb this, write in the chat memory the world you are playing in, and specify that The Covenant is the only Halo content permitted.

The bot may also have Covenant infantry be a touch chatty at times. My code restricts it, but it's still possible. Otherwise, there's so much I wanted to include, but that's not possible without lorebooks, or comprising chat memory with more tokens

Image is from Google

(Search Relevance: Halo, Alien Invasion RPG)
creator: FatCow54
